title: hypericum dubium var. perforatum
intro: Hypericum dubium var. perforatum, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Hypericum genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of St. John's Wort include its ability to alleviate symptoms of mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. St. John's Wort can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, capsules, and ointments, and is often used topically to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations.
